title: T-053 — UI: Warehouse management pages — dashboard + inventory + locations + settings — WH-001/012/018/020/M-13 (WH §14.1, §14.5, §14.6, §16.0)
prompt:
# T-053 — UI: Warehouse management pages — dashboard + inventory + locations + settings — WH-001/012/018/020/M-13 (WH §14.1, §14.5, §14.6, §16.0)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §14.1, §14.5, §14.6, §16.0, §16.6 WH-001/012/018/020/M-13
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/dashboard.jsx:1-213 (warehouse_dashboard)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/other-screens.jsx:3-152 (inventory_browser_page)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/other-screens.jsx:156-264 (locations_hierarchy_page)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:1010-1048 (location_edit_modal)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/other-screens.jsx:484-631 (warehouse_settings_page)

## Goal
Implement /(app)/warehouse dashboard + /inventory browser (3-view toggle) + /locations hierarchy + /settings with 1:1 prototype parity, server-side RBAC value gate, ltree LP-presence deactivate guard.

## Implementation contract
1. Dashboard RSC: KPI tiles (cached 60 s), alerts panel, recent activity feed; value tile RBAC-gated server-side (T-045).
2. Inventory browser: 3-view toggle (?view=product|location|batch) per §14.5; value column omitted/null for non-Manager.
3. Locations: master-detail with ltree tree on left + LP table on right; Admin actions wired to T-046 deactivate-guard.
4. Settings: 9-category left-nav with separate forms per category; rule-registry settings (FEFO, state machine) read-only (V-WH-SET-001); Locations/Integrations tabs are scaffolded placeholders (BL-WH-02).
5. All 5 root elements expose `data-prototype-label`.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(app)/warehouse/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(app)/warehouse/inventory/** [create]
- apps/web/app/(app)/warehouse/locations/** [create]
- apps/web/app/(app)/warehouse/settings/** [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/dashboard.jsx
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/other-screens.jsx
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx

## Prototype parity
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/dashboard.jsx:1-213 (warehouse_dashboard)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/other-screens.jsx:3-152 (inventory_browser_page)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/other-screens.jsx:156-264 (locations_hierarchy_page)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:1010-1048 (location_edit_modal)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/other-screens.jsx:484-631 (warehouse_settings_page)
- Evidence policy: _meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given /warehouse renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/dashboard.jsx:1-213 (warehouse_dashboard), then KPI tiles, alerts panel, activity feed match; non-Manager session does not see inventory_value tile.
2. Given /warehouse/inventory with ?view=product renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/other-screens.jsx:3-152 (inventory_browser_page), then row expansion shows underlying LPs; non-Manager session omits the Value column server-side.
3. Given /warehouse/locations renders, when Admin clicks Deactivate on a node with active LPs (or descendants), then the action is blocked with V-WH-DASH-002 error.
4. Given /warehouse/settings renders, when Admin opens FEFO Strategy or LP State Machine settings, then the form is read-only (V-WH-SET-001 — admin cannot edit; PR/deploy only).

Note: UI closeout must include screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (verified via test_strategy + checkpoint_policy.closeout_requires; previously a 5th AC, hoisted to process layer by Fixer F6 2026-05-14).

## Test strategy
- RED: Playwright + RTL covering 5 labels, value RBAC server-side, deactivate guard, rule-registry read-only, BL-WH-02 placeholders.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test warehouse-mgmt-ui && pnpm playwright test --project=chromium --grep @warehouse-mgmt-ui`.
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not compute inventory_value client-side for non-authorized roles (data minimization).
- Do not allow deactivate when LPs present (V-WH-DASH-002).
- Do not allow editing rule-registry settings via UI (V-WH-SET-001).

## Dependencies
- T-045
- T-046
- T-009
- T-044
